question_html: Write a short paragraph on ‘Impacts of Civic Engagement in Society’. 10
solution_html:
Impacts of Civic Engagement in Society

Civic engagement greatly influences society by improving the quality of people’s lives. It encourages individuals to use their knowledge, skills, and values to make a difference in public life. Through civic engagement, people become more aware of their responsibilities as citizens. They work to prevent injustice, discrimination, and other forms of social ills. Activities such as organizing rallies, writing petitions, or cleaning public spaces directly benefit the community. These efforts help improve public health and overall wellbeing. When civic engagement is included in education, it connects learning with real-life action. Learners apply classroom knowledge to solve community problems and develop leadership qualities. Volunteer activities also build unity, cooperation, and care among citizens. Thus, civic engagement strengthens society by creating responsible individuals who work for common good.

Marks Distribution:

Highest Marks ----------------------------------------------09 Marks

(A) For Title (Impacts of Civic Engagement in Society) ---------------------------------01 Mark

(B) Topic Sentence (Introduction) -----------------------01 Mark

Civic engagement greatly influences society by improving the quality of people’s lives.

(C) Context Explanation (Impacts of Civic Engagement in Society) (Any 6 Points) ----06 Marks
‎• Civic engagement enhances societal quality by empowering individuals to contribute positively to public life.
‎• It fosters awareness of civic responsibilities and helps combat injustice and discrimination.
‎• Community activities like organizing rallies and cleaning public spaces yield direct benefits, improving public health and wellbeing.

•Civic engagement being included in education, connects learning with real-life action.
‎• Integrating civic engagement into education enables students to apply academic knowledge to real-world problems and develop leadership skills.
‎• Volunteer efforts promote unity, cooperation, and care among citizens.

(D) Conclusion -----------------------------------------------------------------01 Mark

In conclusion, civic engagement strengthens society by creating responsible individuals who work for common good.

Instructions:

1. For every 3 spelling/grammatical mistakes, 01 mark has to be deducted.

2. Students must write within a para. If a student writes more than one para, half of the deserving marks must be deducted. (Comment: Write within single/one para).

3. For writing only the title of the paragraph bears no mark.

4. For writing only the title of the paragraph bears no mark. (comment: Write the Title / Impacts of Civic Engagement in Society)

question_html:
Make meaningful sentences using the following words. 5

Impair, Dissolution, Vague, Intervene, Extravagant
solution_html:
Impair (Verb): Excessive alcohol consumption can impair cognitive functions in adults.

Dissolution (Noun): The dissolution of the parliament led to early elections in the country.

Vague (Adjective): I have a vague memory of meeting her at the party last year.

Intervene (Verb): The government decided to intervene in the economy to stabilize inflation.

Extravagant (Adjective): His birthday celebration was so extravagant that it surprised everyone.

Instructions:

(i) Any correct and logically meaningful sentence will be accepted. (Sentences with weak meaning will not be allowed.)

(ii) For any grammatical or structural mistake, full marks have to be deducted. Examiners have to show and correct the mistake(s) in the scripts.

(iii) For 02 spelling mistakes, 01 mark will be deducted, for 01 spelling mistake, 0.5 marks will be

deducted from that very sentence.

(iv) For changing the part of speech of the given word by adding a suffix or prefix, the full marks have

To be deducted from the very number. But students can use any form if the given word is a verb

(depending on the subject-verb agreement, tense, person, number, etc.)

Comment: Use the given word without changing its parts of speech.

question_html:
Translate the following paragraph into English. 5

বাংলাদেশে পর্বতারোহণ একটি নতুন ক্রীড়া কার্যক্রম এবং আমরা এখনো পর্যন্ত নারীদের পর্বতারোহণ কার্যক্রমকে উৎসাহী করার সংস্কৃতি গড়ে তুলতে পারিনি। নিশাত চ্যালেঞ্জটি গ্রহণ করেছিলেন এবং এতে তার বাবা-মা তাকে সমর্থন দিয়েছিলেন। এটি একটি ব্যয়বহুল খেলা এবং নিশাত এবং অন্যান্য পর্বতারোহী সফল হতে পারত না যদি বিভিন্ন সংস্থা তাদের সাহায্য না করতো। নিশাত ২০১২ সালে মাউন্ট এভারেস্ট অভিযানে প্ল্যান ইন্টারন্যাশনাল বাংলাদেশ শাখার “কারণ আমি একজন মেয়ে” ক্যাম্পেইনের প্রতিনিধি ছিলেন। তিনি বাংলাদেশের সব মানুষের জন্য বার্তা দিতে চেয়েছিলেন যে মেয়েরা ছেলেদের মতোই যেকোনো কাজ করতে পারে এবং তাই প্রত্যেক চ্যালেঞ্জিং কাজে বাবা-মা ও সমাজের উচিত তাদেরকে সহযোগিতা করা ।
solution_html:
Translate: In Bangladesh, mountaineering is a new sport activity, and we are yet to develop a culture that will encourage a woman’s mountaineering activities. Nishat took the challenge, and she was supported by her parents. This is an expensive sport, and Nishat and other mountaineers could not have succeeded if several organizations did not help them. Nishat was an ambassador of “Because I am a Girl” campaign of Plan International’s Bangladesh chapter in her expedition to Mount Everest in 2012. She wanted to leave a message for all people of Bangladesh that a girl can do anything a boy can do, and hence every girl should have support from her parents and society in every challenging activity.

Instructions:
‎* For accurate translation using grammar, punctuation, and sentence structure, students will get full marks. [05 marks for translating 05 sentences correctly]

* For every 03 grammatical/spelling errors 01 mark has to be deducted.

question_html:
(i) Fill in the blanks with appropriate words. 5

Children’s right to education is widely recognized today as a fundamental (a)_______ right. But that right also implies that the school they (b)_______ to will have a pleasant and learning-friendly environment where everyone will have an (c)_______ time. Teachers will be kind, caring and supportive and children will feel (d)_______. No harsh words will be spoken to them and special care will be taken of children with (e)_______ disabilities.

(ii) Read the text below and fill in the gaps with words given in the box. There are more words than necessary. 5

Folk music may be described as the music of the ancient times that (a)_____ from the heart of a community, based on their natural style of expression (b)_____ by the rules of classical music or modern popular songs. Any arrangement of sound created by the combination of tune, voice and instrument may be described as music. Folk music is the (c)_____ of song, tune and dance that originate from the traditional culture of (d)____ people. For example, Baul songs are a combination of tune, music and dance that are (e)_____ with the Baul tradition in Bengal.
solution_html:
(i)

(a) human

(b) go

(c) enjoyable

(d) relaxed

(e) learning

Instructions:

Any kind of mistake bears no mark. But mistakes regarding capital and small letters can be overlooked.

(ii)

(a) sprang

(b) uninfluenced

(c) combination

(d) ordinary

(e) associated

Instructions:

Any kind of mistake bears no mark. But mistakes regarding capital and small letters can be overlooked.

question_html: Explain the following proverb within five sentences: “Strike while the iron is hot.” 5
solution_html:
This proverb means that one should take advantage of an opportunity as soon as it arises. If you delay, the opportunity may disappear or become less effective. For example, if a business idea is popular now, acting immediately can bring success. It teaches the importance of timing and being proactive in life. Seizing the right moment can lead to better results and prevent regrets.

Mark Distribution:

(A) Theme of The Proverb-----------------01 mark
‎• The proverb highlights that one should take advantage of an opportunity as soon as it arises.

(B) Context of The Proverb (Strike while the iron is hot) (03 points) -----03 marks

• Delays can result in missed chances or reduced effectiveness of the opportunity.
‎• Timely action on a popular business idea can lead to success.
‎• The message teaches the significance of timing and proactivity in life.

(C) Conclusion-----------------------------------01 mark
‎Ultimately, seizing opportunities can yield better outcomes and minimize regrets.

Instructions:

1. For every 3 spelling/grammatical mistakes, 01 mark has to be deducted.

2. We will consider up to 06-07 sentences. However, if a student writes more than 07 sentences, 01 mark has to be deducted from the deserving number. Comment: Write within five sentences.

question_html:
What do you think the implications of the following stanza? Give arguments in favor of your answer in five sentences. 5

Speaking indifferently to him,

who had driven out the cold

and polished my good shoes as well.

What did I know, what did I know of

love's austere and lonely offices?
solution_html:
The stanza reflects the speaker's regret and newfound understanding of the quiet, unacknowledged sacrifices made by a father. The “indifference” signifies the emotional distance or lack of appreciation during childhood, contrasting with the father's acts of love, such as driving out the cold and polishing shoes. The repetition of “What did I know” emphasizes the speaker's realization of their earlier ignorance about the depth and nature of love. The description of love as “austere and lonely offices” highlights its selfless and often unrecognized nature, performed without expectation of gratitude. This stanza implies that true love is frequently expressed through humble, uncelebrated acts of care, which are often understood only in hindsight.

Marks Distribution:

Highest Mark--------------------------------------05 Marks

(A) The Theme of the Stanza---------01 Mark The stanza reflects the speaker's regret and newfound understanding of the quiet, unacknowledged sacrifices made by a father.

(B) Context Explanation (Any 4 Points) ---------(01 × 04) = 04 Marks
‎• "Indifference" illustrates emotional distance and lack of appreciation during childhood.
‎• Father's love is depicted through acts like driving out the cold and polishing shoes.
‎• Repetition of "What did I know" signals the speaker's realization of past ignorance about love.
‎• Love is described as "austere and lonely offices," denoting its selfless nature without expectation of gratitude.
‎• The stanza suggests true love is shown through humble, uncelebrated acts of care, realized only in hindsight.

Instructions:

1. For every 3 spelling/grammatical mistakes, 01 mark has to be deducted.

2. We will consider up to 06-07 sentences. However, if a student writes more than 07 sentences, 01 mark has to be deducted from the deserving number. Comment: Write within five sentences.
